## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (incorrect G2P output, crash, data error)
- [ ] New normalisation rule or character coverage
- [ ] API addition or change
- [ ] CI / tooling / docs

## Testing

- [ ] New or updated Python tests in `tests/`
- [ ] New or updated Rust tests in `src/`
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` clean

## Checklist

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (if user-visible change)
- [ ] No new dependencies with copyleft / share-alike licenses
